name: Regal Partners Limited
analysis: RPL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7850. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.9000, stop A$2.4156, target A$3.1954 (0.61:1) — then trail it.
